rationale.ai-review: Benchmarks systematic false negatives and mitigation in LLM code-conformance review.
rationale.counterpoint: Opposes assumptions that explanation-heavy prompting improves LLM reasoning accuracy.
rationale.general-code: Reviewed benchmark implementations are correct code, not specifically AI-generated code.
rationale.steering: Mitigation substantively reshapes reviewer prompts and model input structure.
rationale.risk-quality: Studies erroneous conformance judgments and unnecessary modifications to correct code.
rationale.method-experiment: Manipulates prompts across third-party models and benchmark tasks under controlled conditions.
